payload.answer: Stored two experiment result memories for PPO-001 and PPO-002 with their corresponding Reward and Sharpe values and notes.

Run PPO-002 achieved Reward=0.18 and Sharpe=0.51 with Notes='entropy tuned'.

details: Recorded PPO-001: Reward 0.12, Sharpe 0.45, notes baseline.
Recorded PPO-002: Reward 0.18, Sharpe 0.51, notes entropy tuned.

repair_options: If additional context exists (algorithm version, dataset, date), add those as separate memory cards rather than overwriting these numeric metrics.
